elements.name: Verify if a place is added successfully using the Add Place API

steps.name: I have the Add Place Payload with "AppleHouse" "English" "World Cross Center"
user calls the "AddPlaceAPI" with http "POST" request

steps.name: API call is successfull with status code 200
verify that place_id created using AddPlaceAPI maps to "AppleHouse" using "GetPlaceAPI"
